summary: Completed comprehensive testing of updated REFMEX landing page with new content, statistics, contact information, and legal modals. All major features working correctly including WhatsApp integration, language selector, and service modals.

ui_bugs.issue: REPSE modal may not be displaying the detailed requirements for Personas Físicas (12 items) and Personas Morales (13 items) as expected
Ethics principles a-e format not clearly detected in Values section

passed_tests: Language selector in navbar with Español/English options
Updated 'Quiénes Somos' section with highlighted quote
Service modals open with detailed descriptions
'Contratar Servicio' buttons link to WhatsApp with personalized messages
Contact section with 'Contáctate con Nosotros' and 'Hablar con un Asesor' cards
Office information with new Chiapas phone numbers (961 229 8120, 961 128 9177)
Google Maps links working for all 3 offices
Floating WhatsApp button appears on scroll
Footer with legal modal buttons (Terms, Privacy, Disclaimer)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Verify REPSE modal displays complete requirements lists for Personas Físicas (12 items) and Personas Morales (13 items). Ensure ethics principles a-e are clearly formatted in Values section.
